steps.title: Solve the linear equation for x
steps.content:
The first equation is linear.
$$x + 7 = 13$$
Subtracting 7 from both sides:
$$x = 6$$

steps.title: Substitute x = 6 into the quadratic equation
steps.content:
Now substitute $x = 6$ into the second equation to find $y$:
$$y = 5x^2 + 5$$
$$y = 5(6)^2 + 5$$
$$y = 5(36) + 5$$
$$y = 180 + 5 = 185$$
The intersection point is $(6, 185)$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
